issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) 'count' parameter specifying 4 cards examined, (2) 'filter' with proper type/name conditions (Sanji OR Big Mom Pirates, excluding Charlotte Pudding), (3) 'limit' parameter to restrict reveal/add to 1 card, (4) action for placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order
Filter 'kind':'Any' does not match card text. Should filter for (HasCardType 'Sanji' OR HasCardType 'Big Mom Pirates') AND NOT (HasCardName 'Charlotte Pudding')
